questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Choose the best connective: '____ the equipment was old, it functioned reliably.'
questions.solution:
**Concept.** A contrast between two clauses is introduced by a concessive conjunction.

**Working.** Old equipment working reliably is unexpected, so a contrast word ('Although') is needed; 'Because' would imply causation.

**Answer.** Although.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A can finish a job in $12$ days and B in $6$ days. Working together, they finish it in _____ days.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Add the per-day work rates.

**Working.** $\dfrac{1}{12}+\dfrac{1}{6}=\dfrac{1}{12}+\dfrac{2}{12}=\dfrac{3}{12}=\dfrac{1}{4}$, so $4$ days.

**Answer.** $4$ days.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: On the clock face shown, the time is $3{:}00$. Compute the smaller angle between the hour and minute hands (degrees).

figure.caption: Clock at 3:00
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 170 175' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='85' cy='80' r='60' fill='#e5e7eb' stroke='#475569'/><line x1='85' y1='80' x2='85' y2='28' stroke='#1f2937' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='85' y1='80' x2='133' y2='80' stroke='#dc2626' stroke-width='2'/><text x='55' y='160' font-size='8'>time = 3:00</text></svg>

questions.solution:
**Concept.** Each hour mark is $30^\circ$ apart.

**Working.**
$$3\text{ hours}\times30^\circ=90^\circ$$

**Answer.** $90^\circ$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.topic: Quantitative Aptitude — Time, Speed and Distance
questions.stem: A car travels $180$ km in $3$ hours. Its average speed is _____ km/h.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Choose the correct preposition: 'The ore sample was analysed ____ traces of gold.'
questions.solution:
**Concept.** 'Analyse for' is the idiomatic collocation when testing for the presence of something.

**Working.** We test a sample 'for' a substance; the other prepositions do not fit this sense.

**Answer.** for.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Using A=1, B=2, ..., Z=26, the sum of the letter values of the word 'COAL' is _____ .
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Add positional values of each letter.

**Working.** C$=3$, O$=15$, A$=1$, L$=12$; sum $=31$.

**Answer.** $31$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A boat's speed in still water is $10$ km/h and the stream flows at $2$ km/h. The time taken to travel $24$ km downstream is _____ hours.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Downstream speed = boat + stream.

**Working.** Downstream speed $=10+2=12$ km/h; time $=\dfrac{24}{12}=2$ h.

**Answer.** $2$ h.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: If 'MINE' is coded as 'NJOF', then 'COAL' is coded as
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Each letter is shifted forward by one (the +1 cipher).

**Working.** C→D, O→P, A→B, L→M gives DPBM.

**Answer.** DPBM.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: In the right triangle shown, the hypotenuse is $13$ and one leg is $5$. The other leg is _____ .

figure.caption: Right triangle with hypotenuse 13, one leg 5, and the other leg unknown.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 170' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><polygon points='40,140 170,140 40,40' fill='rgba(16,185,129,0.10)' stroke='#10b981' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='40' y='128' width='12' height='12' fill='none' stroke='#10b981' stroke-width='1'/><text x='100' y='155' font-size='12' fill='#ef4444'>?</text><text x='20' y='95' font-size='12' fill='#334155'>5</text><text x='112' y='85' font-size='12' fill='#334155'>13</text></svg>

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Two parallel lines are cut by a transversal. If one interior angle is $70^\circ$ (see figure), its co-interior (same-side) angle is

figure.caption: Two parallel lines crossed by a transversal; one interior angle is marked 70 degrees.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 170' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><line x1='20' y1='60' x2='200' y2='60' stroke='#6366f1' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='20' y1='120' x2='200' y2='120' stroke='#6366f1' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='60' y1='30' x2='160' y2='150' stroke='#334155' stroke-width='2'/><text x='95' y='78' font-size='11' fill='#ef4444'>70</text><text x='118' y='112' font-size='11' fill='#10b981'>?</text></svg>

questions.solution:
**Concept.** Co-interior (same-side interior) angles between parallel lines are supplementary.

**Working.** $180^\circ-70^\circ=110^\circ$.

**Answer.** $110^\circ$.

questions.subject: Soil Mechanics
questions.stem: The coefficient of consolidation $c_v$ has the same dimensions as
questions.solution:
**Concept.** $c_v$ has units of area/time (e.g. m²/yr).

**Working.**
$L^2T^{-1}$.

**Answer.** length²/time

questions.subject: Foundation Engineering
questions.stem: Immediate (elastic) settlement of a footing on saturated clay is computed using
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Immediate settlement uses $E_u$, $\nu=0.5$ (no volume change).

**Working.**
$E_u$, $\nu=0.5$.

**Answer.** Undrained $E_u$, $\nu=0.5$
